title:
Starting in Exeter.
Not stopping there.

milestones.title: Exeter pilot
milestones.desc: Proof of concept: our first dispensers land in high-footfall Exeter locations. Real users, real data, real impact — from day one.

milestones.title: 20+ machines across the UK
milestones.desc: Using pilot data to roll out to universities, stadiums and transport hubs nationwide — funded by advertising partners.

milestones.title: Beyond the UK
milestones.desc: Partnering with larger advertisers to fund outreach in lower-income countries — because period poverty has no borders.

bipText: Every step of the journey — the wins, the rejections, the spreadsheets — documented openly. Social channels are launching alongside the pilot.
